# DomyDomains — Full Documentation

> The fastest domain name search tool on the internet. Search 400+ TLDs instantly.

## Overview

DomyDomains (https://domydomains.com) is a free domain availability search engine. It checks domain availability across 400+ top-level domains (TLDs) in real-time, helping users find the perfect domain name for their website, business, or project.

## How It Works

1. **Type a domain name** — Results appear instantly as you type
2. **Phase 1** — The first 30 popular TLDs are checked immediately (.com, .net, .org, .io, .ai, .dev, etc.)
3. **Phase 2** — All 324+ TLDs are checked in the background in batches of 30
4. **Results** — Green = available, Red = taken. Click "Continue" to register at Namecheap

## Features

### Domain Search
Search any domain name across 400+ TLDs. Results show availability status (available/taken) with direct registration links.

### Domain Extensions
Browse all 324+ TLD extensions with color-coded availability cards. Available domains shown in green, taken in red.

### Domain Generator
Enter a keyword and get creative domain name variations using common prefixes (try, get, my, the, go, pro) and suffixes (hq, tech, studio, labs, hub, cloud, app).

### Premium/Aftermarket Domains
Discover premium domains for sale in the aftermarket with pricing information.

## API Reference

### Search Domains
```
GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/search/?q={name}
```
Parameters:
- `q` (required): Domain name to search (without TLD)
- `scope`: `popular` (23 TLDs, fast) or `all` (324+ TLDs, comprehensive)
- `limit`: Maximum number of results
- `offset`: Skip N results (for pagination)

Response:
```json
{
  "query": "example",
  "results": [
    {
      "full_domain": "example.com",
      "tld": "com",
      "available": false
    },
    {
      "full_domain": "example.io",
      "tld": "io",
      "available": true
    }
  ]
}
```

### Get Suggestions
```
GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/suggestions/?q={name}
```
Returns creative domain name suggestions based on the input keyword.

## Supported TLDs

### Popular TLDs (23)
.com, .net, .org, .io, .dev, .ai, .app, .co, .me, .xyz, .tech, .info, .biz, .cloud, .design, .blog, .shop, .site, .store, .online, .gg, .cc, .tv

### All TLDs (324+)
Includes all popular TLDs plus country codes (.uk, .de, .fr, .jp, .au, etc.), new gTLDs (.cloud, .design, .studio, .agency, etc.), and specialty TLDs (.pro, .mobi, .tel, .name, etc.).

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js (React) — Server-side rendered, mobile-first responsive
- **Backend**: Django + Django REST Framework — RESTful API
- **Domain Checking**: DNS resolution (fast, no external API dependency)
- **Hosting**: Railway

## Contact

- Website: https://domydomains.com
- Twitter: https://x.com/domydomains
